commits.author: Reinhard Sanz
commits.subject: fix: Fix Dnd issues for group props, caused by reference going stale

commits.author: Reinhard Sanz
commits.subject: fix: Component editor redesign, fix id collision for dropzones

commits.author: Matteo Greco
commits.subject: docs: add ADRs for streaming-only AI chat and RAG middleware integration [hide] [skip ci]
commits.body:
ADR 0012 documents the removal of the non-streaming AI response path,
leaving streaming as the only supported mode.

ADR 0013 documents how the plugin communicates with the RAG middleware:
tool registration, request flow, error handling, graceful degradation,
and the dependency on the middleware's API contract.
